item.name: Chocobo Carriage Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone discernible only by a chocobo trained from birth to recognize and respond to the sound, carriage and all.

mount.name: Chocobo Carriage
mount.action: Summon forth your chocobo carriage to ferry your friends around in comfort.
mount.description: A ubiquitous mode of transportation in Eorzea, the chocobo carriage is kept aloft by ceruleum gas-filled bladders. This technology traces its origins to an early Ixali dirigible that crashed in the Twelveswood and was seized by Gridanian authorities.
mount.tooltip:
We get to ride a horsebird
carriage? I don't know...
It sounds scary.
- Doman Child
